actions.name: config_sync
actions.summary: The runtime config was created from the repo template. The orchestrator backend was normalized to codex_local for remote Codex execution.
actions.guidance: Keep runtime.orchestrator_backend=codex_local for the SSH/devbox execution path.

actions.name: codex_surface_install
actions.summary: The Codex-local surface was installed on the remote machine. No standalone plugin export was requested. Hermes install was skipped because the selected remote runtime does not require it.

details.stdout: Installed deep-gvr Codex skill at ~/.codex/skills/deep-gvr using symlink mode.
details.hermes_install_reason: Selected runtime path does not require the Hermes surface

actions.guidance: Rerun this command with --force when you want to refresh the installed skill or plugin export in place.

actions.name: evidence_directory
actions.summary: The configured evidence directory was created for remote runs.
actions.guidance: Keep the evidence directory writable from the remote machine so checkpoints and artifacts persist correctly.

next_steps: Run uv run python scripts/codex_preflight.py --ssh-devbox --operator after the remote install and config sync complete.

checks.name: codex_cli
checks.summary: Codex CLI is available on PATH.
checks.guidance: Use the same Codex install for the local deep-gvr skill and codex exec smoke runs.

checks.name: codex_skill_install
checks.summary: The deep-gvr Codex-local skill is installed and matches the repo copy.
checks.guidance: Re-run bash scripts/install_codex.sh if the installed Codex skill is stale, or use uv run python scripts/codex_remote_bootstrap.py on a remote Codex host to refresh it in place.

checks.name: ssh_devbox_backend
checks.summary: The Codex-local backend can execute directly from this SSH/devbox machine using the selected local Tier 2 backend.
checks.guidance: Use the remote machine as the strong execution host, and rerun the remote bootstrap or Codex preflight if its local analysis environment changes.
